title: Research & Science
description: Pioneering scientific studies on carbon dioxide removal (CDR) techniques, soil sequestration models, and MRV methodologies optimized for Indian basalt soils and agricultural conditions.

title: Policy Advocacy
description: Collaborating closely with ministries (MoEFCC, Ministry of Power, MNRE) to shape the domestic Carbon Credit Trading Scheme (CCTS), Green Credit Programme (GCP), and Article 6 implementation.

title: Ecosystem Building
description: Uniting project developers, buyers, farmers' organizations, and technology providers to build a transparent, liquid, and high-integrity market structure.

title: Capacity Building
description: Equipping industries, developers, and farming collectives with the know-how, carbon accounting tools, and verification methodologies needed to participate in carbon markets.

title: International Engagement
description: Connecting India's carbon market with global standards, facilitating bilateral Article 6.2 transactions, and showcasing India's climate initiatives at COP summits.

title: Knowledge Transfer
description: Disseminating technical reports, policy briefs, and carbon credit market trackers to drive transparency and academic-industry collaboration.
